thinking:
**Analyzing the UI Breakage**

I've observed consistent use of `<div className="flex gap-2">` in the header across all instances. My current approach involves modifying these divs to include `shrink-0`, and adjusting button elements to incorporate `whitespace-nowrap`. This aims to decisively prevent the undesirable line breaks. I'm planning to implement this using `multi_replace_file_content`.


**Implementing the Changes**

I'm now focusing on implementing the fixes within `CompanyDashboard.tsx`. I've identified four instances of the problematic UI component.  Each requires replacing the `flex gap-2` div with `flex gap-2 shrink-0`, alongside adding `whitespace-nowrap` to the button elements. I plan to use `multi_replace_file_content` for efficiency. The first three target replacements are for "Currículo", "DISC", and "Mapeamento" components, and then "Customizado".

args.Description: "Adiciona whitespace-nowrap e shrink-0 no botão de baixar PDF e seu contêiner para evitar a quebra de linha nos cabeçalhos dos modais de relatórios/currículo."
args.Instruction: "Substituir <div className=\"flex gap-2\"> por <div className=\"flex gap-2 shrink-0\"> e adicionar a classe whitespace-nowrap em todos os botões de Baixar PDF de testes e currículo no CompanyDashboard.tsx."
args.toolAction: "Editando CompanyDashboard.tsx para evitar quebra de linha no botão de baixar PDF"
args.toolSummary: "Prevenir quebra de linha nos botões de PDF"
